text: provenance note (RUSTSEC-2026-0103): RUSTSEC-2026-0103 records a use-after-free and double free in the thin-vec crate's IntoIter drop path when an element drop panics. snapshot retrieved 2026-07-14; raw sha256 1207db30; canonical url https://raw.githubusercontent.com/rustsec/advisory-db/osv/crates/RUSTSEC-2026-0103.json; frozen acquisition bytes; independently refetched and verified; promoted record; dated drift note: none; capture seat: mechanical; registry provenance entry; content identity confirmed; record text begins: A Double Free / Use-After-Free (UAF) vulnerability has been identified in the `IntoIter::drop` and `ThinVec::clear` implementations
